package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_database_access_count_query_before_paged_fetch: Layer: Database access. Flag count queries paired with page fetches on every request without cache or user-visible need.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule524PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario524Positive(records []Rule524PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
